ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the user's role */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* User's bio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "folders" (
  "folder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each folder */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the folder */,
  "parent_folder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent folder (if any) */,
  "folder_name" TEXT /* Name of the folder */,
  "folder_type" TEXT /* Type of the folder (e.g., bookmarks menu, bookmarks toolbar) */,
  "folder_description" TEXT /* Description of the folder */,
  "view_access" TEXT /* User IDs who can view the folder */,
  "edit_access" TEXT /* User IDs who can edit the folder */,
  "delete_access" TEXT /* User IDs who can delete the folder */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date and time the folder was added */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date and time the folder was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("folder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_folders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_folders_parent_folder_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_folder_id") REFERENCES folders ("folder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookmarks" (
  "bookmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bookmark */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the bookmark */,
  "folder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the folder where the bookmark is stored */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the bookmark */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the bookmark */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bookmark */,
  "preview_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the preview image of the bookmark */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* User rating for the bookmark (1-5) */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date and time the bookmark was added */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date and time the bookmark was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bookmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookmarks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookmarks_folder_id FOREIGN KEY ("folder_id") REFERENCES folders ("folder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "keyword_name" TEXT /* Name of the keyword */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the keyword */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the keyword */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the keyword is used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_keywords_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the tag */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the tag is used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookmark_keywords" (
  "bookmark_keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bookmark-keyword association */,
  "bookmark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bookmark */,
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* ID of the keyword */,
  "added_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the keyword to the bookmark */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bookmark_keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookmark_keywords_keyword_id FOREIGN KEY ("keyword_id") REFERENCES keywords ("keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookmark_keywords_added_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("added_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookmark_keywords_bookmark_id FOREIGN KEY ("bookmark_id") REFERENCES bookmarks ("bookmark_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookmark_tags" (
  "bookmark_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bookmark-tag association */,
  "bookmark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bookmark */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  "added_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the tag to the bookmark */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bookmark_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookmark_tags_added_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("added_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookmark_tags_bookmark_id FOREIGN KEY ("bookmark_id") REFERENCES bookmarks ("bookmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookmark_tags_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "folder_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "folder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the folder */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the action performed */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_folder_history_folder_id FOREIGN KEY ("folder_id") REFERENCES folders ("folder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_folder_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookmark_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "bookmark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bookmark */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the action performed */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookmark_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookmark_history_bookmark_id FOREIGN KEY ("bookmark_id") REFERENCES bookmarks ("bookmark_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "bookmark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bookmark being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the bookmark */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the bookmark was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user's access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_bookmark_id FOREIGN KEY ("bookmark_id") REFERENCES bookmarks ("bookmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
